race.comment: MIND YA BIZZ (4) was rewarded for her consistency second-up when shedding her Maiden tag at start six. Heading in the right direction and she finds a fairly even C1 from the low gate. Go close. FUNSHOW (2) talented gelding yet to finish out of the money in five career starts. Returned from a let-up in a four-horse field with a dominant on-pace victory over 1300m at Newcastle. Adept in all going and looks to have genuine top-three claims. FULL OF FUN (6) kept safe in betting on debut with a sharp Maiden win over 1400m at Newcastle on a soft (7) surface. Gets a similar setup for this with the blinkers going on. Back to her home track and capable of winning again. FLYING FROM ABOVE (3) had mixed luck in his two runs this prep and will relish Grima's 2kg claim here. Will find this more to his liking and not to be overlooked.
